# Lifetime Weddings

> Wedding photography and videography studio based in Reus, Catalonia, Spain. Run by two brothers — Ferran (photographer) and Eric (videographer) — covering weddings in Tarragona, Reus, Lleida, Barcelona and international destinations.

## About
- Second generation of a family of photographers
- 15+ years of experience
- 150+ weddings covered
- Documentary / photojournalism style — no forced poses
- 5-star rated on Google

## Services
- Wedding photography: from €1,290 + VAT. 700–1,200 edited images, private gallery delivered in 3–4 weeks.
- Wedding videography: documentary film 25–35 min, delivered in 8–10 weeks.
- Pre-wedding session: optional engagement session.
- Combined photo + video packs: from €2,480 + VAT.

## Coverage areas
Tarragona · Reus · Lleida · Barcelona · Catalonia · International (past weddings in New York, Málaga, Huesca)
